The Architecture of Thinking

Daina Emmanuel

The Architecture of Thinking

On Judgment, Machines, and Reasoning. A leader navigating AI risk systems discovers the hardest questions are human, not technical.

Sovereign Signal

Set in 2031 Brussels — a policy analyst discovers three AI governance bodies running on the same foundation model, with diverging fine-tunes.

The Integration Memo

ForthcomingIntegration · HR

A journal built for the AI governance moment

Axiom Review was founded on the belief that the most consequential questions about artificial intelligence are not technical — they are institutional, ethical, and managerial. We publish work that bridges the gap between policy theory and organizational practice.

I

AI Governance

Regulatory frameworks, accountability structures, and the politics of AI oversight.

II

Integration Considerations

What organizations must think through before, during, and after deploying AI systems.

III

Policy Analysis

Careful reading of emerging AI policy — from the EU to India to the UN — with implications for practitioners.

Axiom Review

A journal of AI governance, policy analysis, and management fiction. Published independently.
